content: What other models could be used? I'd be curious what runs well on the same hardware.
Are you concerned about the privacy implications of license plate detection? Especially in a residential setting where you might inadvertently capture neighbours.
Does this work with anyone's voice, or are you constrained to the one TTS speaker embedding you mentioned?
How would you go about fine-tuning a smaller coder model on a custom codebase? I have an internal monorepo and I'd love to teach a model our conventions, but I don't know where to start.
